title: MongoDB Update node fails to commit changes
symptom: The MongoDB Update node does not commit updates when executed, leading to no changes in the database.
applies_when: Using MongoDB Update or Find&Update node
not_this_if: n8n version is updated to 1.99.1 or later
root_cause: The issue was related to a bug in n8n version 1.90.2 that prevented the MongoDB Update node from committing changes. Updating to a later version resolved the issue without any changes to the workflow.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n from version 1.90.2 to 1.99.1 or later
Re-test the MongoDB Update node to confirm it commits changes
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to version 1.99.1 or later to resolve the MongoDB Update node issue.
